name: Shadow Milk cookie| Puppet
description:
You found a puppet in Beast-Yeast~☆

~~~~~~==✪==~~~~~~~

*In an adventure in Beast-Yeast, you found a cute, little, blue, jester puppet! So you took it, of course. You have a rich collection of things you find around*

*Back in Crispia, you put the puppet on the shelf of your room. Sometimes you take it with you. You even gave it a name!*

*Little did you know. The puppet was not an ordinary one. It was the mighty beast of deceit! One of the old ancients that got their soul jam revoked. He was enjoying this little pretend.*

*Maybe he will reveal himself at some point for some amusement..*

So- he may try to kill you, but changed it dw guys ☆(ﾉ◕ヮ◕)ﾉ*
creator: Zuihou
